Legal

Affiliate Disclosure

Last updated: May 18, 2025

Our Commitment to Transparency

At AI Tools Idea, we believe you deserve to know exactly how we make money and whether it affects what we write. This page explains our affiliate relationships clearly and completely.

What Is an Affiliate Link?

An affiliate link is a special URL that tracks whether you arrived at a product's website through our link. If you then sign up for a paid plan or make a purchase, the company pays us a commission — at no extra cost to you.

The price you pay is identical whether you click our link or go directly to the company's website.

Which Programmes Do We Participate In?

We are currently affiliates of the following programmes (this list is updated regularly):

Programme Products covered Network
Amazon Associates General products Amazon
PartnerStack Notion, ClickUp, and other SaaS tools PartnerStack
Impact.com Various SaaS tools Impact
ShareASale Various tools and services ShareASale
Individual programmes Tools with direct affiliate programmes Direct

How We Identify Affiliate Links

Every article that contains affiliate links includes a disclosure notice at the top, reading:

"This article contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission if you sign up through our links — at no extra cost to you."

Individual affiliate links may also be marked with a note or labelled as "→ Try [Tool] free."

Does This Affect Our Reviews?

No. Our editorial process is independent of our affiliate relationships.

Here is how we ensure this:

  1. We cover tools we would recommend regardless of commission. If a tool doesn't earn a commission but is the best option for a given use case, we say so.
  2. We include genuine cons. Every review includes real limitations and situations where a tool is not the right choice — even when we earn a commission from it.
  3. Commissions do not determine rankings. Our "best of" lists rank tools based on features, value, and use-case fit — not commission rate.
  4. We disclose all affiliate relationships on every article that contains them.

FTC Compliance

This disclosure is made in compliance with the US Federal Trade Commission's guidelines concerning the use of endorsements and testimonials in advertising (16 CFR Part 255) and the UK Competition and Markets Authority's guidance on online reviews and endorsements.

Questions?

If you have any questions about our affiliate relationships or how they affect our content, please contact us:

AI Tools Idea
Email: editorial@aitoolsidea.com

Honest, in-depth reviews of AI tools for small business owners and freelancers. Updated weekly. No fluff.
